text: {"suggestedLabel":"Skeptical on Nut Cardiovascular Benefits","suggestedDescription":"A cautious perspective that treats positive nut studies as uncertain and emphasizes potential confounding factors.","stances":[{"claimIndex":0,"stance":"uncertain","rationale":"While large cohort studies report associations, the evidence is not decisive given possible biases."},{"claimIndex":1,"stance":"uncertain","rationale":"The Nurses Health Study finding is intriguing but may reflect lifestyle differences rather than a causal nut effect."},{"claimIndex":2,"stance":"accept","rationale":"Indeed, nut consumers often have healthier habits, so confounding is a serious concern."}]}
